name: Unsplash Smart MCP Server
what_it_does: Unsplash Smart MCP server enabling AI agents to search and retrieve high-quality free stock photos from Unsplash — finding images by keyword, category, color, or semantic description, retrieving photo metadata and attribution, and downloading photos for use in content creation, design, and documentation workflows. 'Smart' variant likely includes semantic/AI-enhanced search capabilities beyond basic keyword search.
use_cases: Finding relevant stock photos for blog posts and articles from content creation agents
Selecting images for presentation slides from design agents
Searching for product photography inspiration from marketing agents
Retrieving photos with specific colors or moods from brand consistency agents
Illustrating documentation and README files from technical writing agents
Building image-rich applications with curated Unsplash photography from developer agents
not_for: Commercial use without proper Unsplash attribution (license requires attribution)
High-volume automated downloads (Unsplash API rate limits apply)
Custom or branded photography (Unsplash is curated stock photography)
best_when: An agent needs high-quality royalty-free photos for content creation, design, or development — Unsplash provides 3M+ professionally curated photos with a free API.
avoid_when: You need commercial use without attribution, require custom photography, or need high volumes of images that would exceed API rate limits.

auth.notes: Unsplash API access key required. Register as developer at unsplash.com/developers. Free tier: 50 requests/hour for development; production requires application approval. Set UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free API: 50 requests/hour (development); production access requires application approval
pricing.paid_tiers: No paid API tiers; Unsplash+ subscription for higher res downloads
pricing.notes: Unsplash API is free for approved applications. Photos are free to use with attribution. MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: 50 requests/hour (development); 5000 requests/hour for approved production apps

known_agent_gotchas: Rate limits are strict on development keys (50/hour) — production use requires application approval from Unsplash
Unsplash license REQUIRES attribution — agents must include photographer credit in any published content
Photo search is keyword-based by default — semantic search quality varies
Photo download URLs are temporary — cache photo IDs, not URLs, for long-term storage
Production API access requires applying to Unsplash (review process) — plan ahead
Smart semantic search may require additional AI processing — verify what 'smart' features are available
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS Unsplash API. API key auth. Photos are public-domain equivalent for use with attribution. No sensitive data transmitted. Store API key as environment variable.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Public photo service. Attribution required by license. No sensitive data.
